<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=280756316 space=SYSML2P version=14 -->
## PAGE 00563: Customizing Relationship Creation dialog

- page_id: `280756316`
- space_key: `SYSML2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/SYSML2P/pages/280756316/Customizing+Relationship+Creation+dialog
- version_number: 14
- version_date: `2026-02-09T14:35:10.777+01:00`
- ancestors: SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > Model customization > Custom creation dialogs > Custom Relationship Creation dialog
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

See the following procedures for customizing the predefined *SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog* configuration for the Relationship Creation dialog and submenu.

#### NOTE: Updating the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

Updating the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

Once you have created the new Relationship Creation dialog/submenu, activate it via the[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Activating Relationship Creation dialog' space=''].

The procedures on this page use the example of customizing the*SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog***part definition. However, you can similarly customize any other custom relationship creation dialog customization part definition you may have.

##### Reusing a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

To reuse a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

1. In the Containment tree, [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Managing elements' space=''] .
2. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Managing Textual Editor' space=''] for the new namespace.
3. In the Textual Editor, [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Package' space=''] and name it.
4. Within the body of the package, declare a part definition, specify the name for the dialog instance, and subclassify the SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog definition from the DS_UIComponents::UIComponents package, then, within the body of the definition:
  1. 
  2. 
  3. 
5. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ // redefining and renaming the *SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog* 
} 
}

##### Renaming the Create Relation command

The default name for the Relationship Creation dialog's invocation command is **Create Relation**.

To rename the Create Element command

1. Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, redefine the actionName attribute with the new element creation command name.
2. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ 
attribute:>>actionNamedefault"Create SysMLv2 Relationships"; // renaming the element creation command to "Create SysMLv2 Relationships" 
} 
}

##### Modifying the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories

#### INFO: Command menus

Command menus

Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories predefined in the *3DS SysML Customization* library's *DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog*are:

- sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu - an outgoing relations creation commands' category in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu.
- sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu - an incoming relations creation commands' category in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu.

###### Creating relationship creation command categories for the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

To create relationship creation command categories for the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

- See the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating Relationship Creation dialog' space=''] procedure on the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating Relationship Creation dialog' space=''] page.

###### Modifying relationship creation command categories in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

To modify relationship creation command categories in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

1. Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, do one of the following:
2. To modify the dialog so it contains only one category:
  1. Declare a part usage for the category, name it, and redefine either sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu for outgoing or sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu for incoming relations.
  2. .
3. To modify both categories in the dialog:
  1. Modify the outgoing category:
    1. Declare a part usage for the outgoing relations category, name it, and redefine the sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu .
    2. Declare a part usage for the incoming relations category, name it, and subset the outgoing relations category, whose name you have specified in the previous step.
      1. . Otherwise, the 'Outgoing' label is used through inheritance.
    3. Remove the *sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu* category . Because the incoming relations category is instantiated by subsetting the outgoing relations category (or vice versa), you need to remove the inherited sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu category to avoid having three categories.
4. Click the Synchronize button.

// modifying the dialog so it contains only one category:

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ 
partcustomOutgoing:>>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu{ }// redefining the *sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu*for outgoing relations 
part:>>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu[0];// removing the *sysMLRelationshipsMenu* command category by setting the multiplicity to zero 
} 
}

// modifying both categories in the dialog:

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ 
partcustomOutgoing:>>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu{ }// redefining the sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu for outgoing relations 
partcustomIncoming:>customOutgoing{// subsetting the customOutgoing for incoming relations 
attribute:>>labeldefault"Incoming";// modifying the incoming relation creation command category's name 
attribute:>>isIncomingdefaulttrue;// modifying the category's commands to be for incoming relations 
} 
part:>>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu[0];// removing the inherited sysMLRelationshipsMenu command category by setting the multiplicity to zero 
} 
}

###### Removing relationship creation command categories from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

To remove relationship creation command categories from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

1. Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, redefine the command category you want to customize, inherited from the specified definition (e.g., SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog ), and set the multiplicity to zero.
2. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ 
part:>>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu[0];// removing the *sysMLRelationshipsMenu* command category by setting the multiplicity to zero 
} 
}

###### Modifying the relationship creation command category attributes of the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

#### INFO: Command menu attributes

Command menu attributes

Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category attributes predefined in the *3DS SysML Customization* library's *DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Components::ItemsCategory*, *AbstractItem*, and *DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Dialogs::RelationshipCreationDialog::itemCategories*are:

- attribute :>> label default "Outgoing" ; // attribute specifies the category name
- attribute:>> isCollapseddefaultfalse;// attribute specifies whether the category is collapsed or expanded by default
- attribute:>> isIncomingdefaulttrue;// attribute specifies whether the category is for incoming or outgoing relations; *true*- incoming; undefined or *false*- outgoing

If the dialog/submenu contains fewer than ten element creation commands, then the category cannot be collapsed. In this case, the *isCollapsed* attribute is ignored.

To modify the relationship creation command category attributes of the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu

1. Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, redefine the command category you want to customize, inherited from the SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog definition.
2. Within the body of the redefining category, redefine the inherited attributes that you want to modify with the needed values.
3. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ 
partcustomOutgoing:>>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu{ 
attribute:>>labeldefault"Source";// modifying the outgoing relation creation command category name 
attribute:>>isCollapseddefaultfalse; // modifying relationship creation command category default collapse state 
} 
partcustomIncoming:>customOutgoing{ 
attribute:>>isIncomingdefaulttrue;// modifying the category's commands to be for incoming relations 
attribute:>>labeldefault"Target"; // modifying the incoming relation creation command category name 
} 
part:>>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu[0]; 
} 
}

##### Modifying the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu commands

#### INFO: Commands in menus

Commands in menus

You can see all the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu commands predefined for the *sysMLRelationshipMenu* in *DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog::sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu*and *sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu.*

###### Removing relationship creation commands from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories

To remove relationship creation commands from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories

1. Place the cursor within the body of the part element redefining a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category*.*
2. Declare a part usage, then redefine the command you want to remove and set its multiplicity to zero.
3. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ 
partcustomOutgoing:>>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu{ 
part:>>assertConstraintUsageItem[0]; // removing the *actionUsageItem*element creation command from the *sysMLElementsMenu*category by setting the multiplicity to zero 
} 
part:>>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu[0]; 
} 
}

###### Renaming relationship creation commands in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category

To rename relationship creation commands in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category

1. Place the cursor within the body of the part element redefining a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category and declare a part usage, then redefine the command you want to modify.
2. Within the body of the redefining usage, redefine the inherited *label*attribute with the needed value.
3. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomRelationshipCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog{ 
partcustomOutgoing:>>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu{ 
part:>>assertConstraintUsageItem{ 
attribute:>>labeldefault"assert constraint usage";// modified command name 
} 
} 
part:>>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu[0]; 
} 
}

###### Adding relationship creation commands to the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories

To add relationship creation commands to the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories

- See the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating Relationship Creation dialog' space=''] procedure on the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating Relationship Creation dialog' space=''] page.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<p style="text-align: left;">See the following procedures for customizing the predefined <em style="text-align: left;">SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</em> configuration for the Relationship Creation dialog and submenu.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="fe3d9e91-6dae-4417-a69b-7ad8f544a57c"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Updating the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p>Once you have created the new Relationship Creation dialog/submenu, activate it via the<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"> <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Activating Relationship Creation dialog" /></ac:link>.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f00e7e31-7544-4226-924b-0c0f8dbb802c"><ac:rich-text-body><p>The procedures on this page use the example of customizing the<span> <em>SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</em></span><em><span> </span></em>part definition. However, you can similarly customize any other custom relationship creation dialog customization part definition you may have.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Reusing a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</h3><p>To reuse a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="85b95bdd-d3bb-4f27-a3cf-890aeed91f86">In the Containment tree,<span> </span><ac:link ac:anchor="Declaring a root namespace"><ri:page ri:content-title="Managing elements" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[create a new root namespace]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</li><li data-uuid="55493bfc-db5f-4063-9041-a034b09805df"><ac:link ac:anchor="Opening the Textual Editor"><ri:page ri:content-title="Managing Textual Editor" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Open the Textual Editor]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><span> </span>for the new namespace.</li><li data-uuid="ea60b8a0-9187-4e1f-a104-84ad47a8a562">In the Textual Editor,<span> </span><ac:link ac:anchor="Creating a package element via the Textual Editor"><ri:page ri:content-title="Package" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[create a package]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><span> </span>and name it.</li><li data-uuid="3f222086-8cb9-4273-8570-0470d63a89e8">Within the body of the package, declare a part definition, specify the name for the dialog instance, and subclassify the <em>SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog </em>definition from the <em>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents </em>package, then, within the body of the definition:<ol><li data-uuid="ff48b19c-8e7d-42df-a36b-c12c6e4e1750"><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Renaming the Create Relation command" /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Modifying the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Modify the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></span></li><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Modifying the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu commands"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Modify the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu commands]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="1707dfbe-1ba4-4e20-a1c6-79c6d5263f58"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.<br /></span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="b791c425-3408-48e1-b3da-a71d77b6fe9b"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// redefining and renaming the <em>SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</em></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3><span>Renaming the Create Relation command</span></h3><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="33729a35-2586-4f84-98c3-cf38a9867f1b"><ac:rich-text-body><p>The default name for the Relationship Creation dialog's invocation command is <strong>Create Relation</strong>.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p>To rename the Create Element command</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="f76e848f-4fcc-4035-8ed5-55a80a429147">Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, redefine the <em>actionName</em> attribute with the new element creation command name. </li><li data-uuid="a0ee9f3f-cceb-4bbf-b4a8-b0ba42a5dbca"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="73c043ce-2665-49c5-8629-b999684bf9a8"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">actionName</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);"><u>&quot;Create SysMLv2 Relationships</u>&quot;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// renaming the element creation command to &quot;Create SysMLv2 Relationships&quot;</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Modifying the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories</h3><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="3d651fa0-ab24-4e74-88b2-36c90e909a55"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Command menus</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p>Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories predefined in the <em>3DS SysML Customization</em> library's <em>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog </em>are: </p><ul><li data-uuid="39878860-607c-4d8e-acc6-4422c9c0728b"><em>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu</em> - an outgoing relations creation commands' category in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu.</li><li data-uuid="693e36d1-d790-4d8f-a120-c798555acc92"><em>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</em> - an incoming relations creation commands' category in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu.</li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4><span class="toc-item-body">Creating relationship creation command categories for the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</span></h4><p><span class="toc-item-body">To create relationship creation command categories for the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</span></p><hr /><ul><li data-uuid="22cc9c00-cca7-4634-b463-d8a5cfbdc081"><span class="toc-item-body">See the <ac:link ac:anchor="Creating relationship creation command categories for the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu"><ri:page ri:content-title="Creating Relationship Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Creating relationship creation command categories for the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> procedure on the <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Creating Relationship Creation dialog" /></ac:link> page.</span></li></ul><h4>Modifying relationship creation command categories in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</h4><p><span>To modify relationship creation command categories in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="b6639e93-7ba6-4dfc-8071-7eff5f6a53e5">Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, do one of the following:</li><li data-uuid="cd8a2e47-0bbc-48fd-99dd-0298824bc6c2">To modify the dialog so it contains only one category:<ol><li data-uuid="17e2662d-79f9-4cf2-81f3-97e839f93e3f">Declare a part usage for the category, name it, and redefine either <em>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu </em>for outgoing or <em>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu </em>for incoming relations.</li><li data-uuid="2a932c68-47d7-4d31-97fd-5e8f2be4b9af"><ac:link ac:anchor="Removing relationship creation command categories from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Remove the remaining category]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</li></ol></li><li data-uuid="298daf41-3427-4dbf-8e25-fd6d1302c8b1">To modify both categories in the dialog:<ol><li data-uuid="a87fd063-fc30-4cb6-954f-747926224387">Modify the outgoing category:<ol><li data-uuid="fe14b63a-60d2-4804-9087-5f8c65c1323e">Declare a part usage for the outgoing relations category, name it, and redefine the <em>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu</em>.</li><li>Declare a part usage for the incoming relations category, name it, and subset the outgoing relations category, whose name you have specified in the previous step.<ol><li data-uuid="767e36ad-aba4-4ca3-9473-02dd8e8c8899"><ac:link ac:anchor="Modifying the relationship creation command category attributes of the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Modify the incoming relation creation command category's name by updating the label attribute]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. Otherwise, the 'Outgoing' label is used through inheritance.</li></ol></li><li data-uuid="4d8b478f-a87a-46c4-bf83-9b318f882068"><ac:link ac:anchor="Removing relationship creation command categories from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu"><ac:link-body>Remove the <em>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</em> category</ac:link-body></ac:link>. Because the incoming relations category is instantiated by subsetting the outgoing relations category (or vice versa), you need to remove the inherited <em>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</em> category to avoid having three categories.</li></ol></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="05e11c04-0b69-490a-8678-77f522ce659c"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="1e8e66d6-7698-45ad-98f5-c6739db3895f"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying the dialog so it contains only one category:</span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customOutgoing</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { } </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// redefining the <em>sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu </em>for outgoing relations</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u> :&gt;&gt; </u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>]</u>;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// removing the <em>sysMLRelationshipsMenu</em> command category by setting the multiplicity to zero</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying both categories in the dialog: </span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customOutgoing</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u> { }</u> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// redefining the sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu for outgoing relations</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customIncoming</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customOutgoing</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u> {</u> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// subsetting the customOutgoing for incoming relations</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="1cd9057a-09aa-4536-b208-0362edbe7b90">attribute</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="1cd9057a-09aa-4536-b208-0362edbe7b90"> :&gt;&gt; </ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="1cd9057a-09aa-4536-b208-0362edbe7b90">label</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="1cd9057a-09aa-4536-b208-0362edbe7b90"> </ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="1cd9057a-09aa-4536-b208-0362edbe7b90">default</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="1cd9057a-09aa-4536-b208-0362edbe7b90"> </ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="1cd9057a-09aa-4536-b208-0362edbe7b90">&quot;Incomi</ac:inline-comment-marker>ng&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>;</u> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying the incoming relation creation command category's name<br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isIncoming</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">true</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span>// modifying the category's commands to be for incoming relations</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>];</u>  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// removing the inherited sysMLRelationshipsMenu command category by setting the multiplicity to zero</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Removing relationship creation command categories from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</h4><p><span>To remove relationship creation command categories from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="1830fbc0-cae0-4fb5-b368-f37950ccf9a8">Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, redefine the command category you want to customize, inherited from the specified definition (e.g., <em>SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</em>), and set the multiplicity to zero.</li><li data-uuid="da66b022-147e-4aae-87ab-1656e4c8bbd1"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="5df1c156-ce9f-4495-9e27-dd38bbe1df86"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>]</u>;  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// removing the <em>sysMLRelationshipsMenu</em> command category by setting the multiplicity to zero</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Modifying the relationship creation command category attributes of the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</h4><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="c1f81596-f852-40cb-ae7e-b890b3794576"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Command menu attributes</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p>Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category attributes predefined in the <em>3DS SysML Customization</em> library's <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><em>DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Components::ItemsCategory</em>, <em>AbstractItem</em>, and <em>DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Dialogs::RelationshipCreationDialog::itemCategories</em></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> are:</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="2725aea4-a54a-4e36-9039-d8ab57ed21d1"><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li data-uuid="648bdd47-715e-45a3-afbf-ea1dda883d37"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt;&gt; label </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;<u>Outgoing</u>&quot;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// attribute specifies the category name<br /></span></li><li data-uuid="65d537e7-0f26-4ee0-9bc0-2a657022fc7c"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt;&gt; isCollapsed </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">false</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span>// attribute specifies whether the category is collapsed or expanded by default</span></li><li data-uuid="6f2f1e6b-37ff-461f-a097-0bb4fb7f9965"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt;&gt; isIncoming </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">true</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span>// attribute specifies whether the category is for incoming or outgoing relations; <em>true </em>- incoming; undefined or <em>false </em>- outgoing</span></li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><ac:structured-macro ac:name="warning" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="c1f372b4-2387-4654-8e9e-76748d2ef534"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">If the dialog/submenu contains fewer than ten element creation commands, then the category cannot be collapsed. In this case, the <em>isCollapsed</em> attribute is ignored.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p>To modify the relationship creation command category attributes of the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="1aef0047-8e01-4dec-ba6c-83daaa0e1e27">Within the body of the part definition element of the new Relationship Creation dialog instance, redefine the command category you want to customize, inherited from the <em>SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</em> definition.</li><li data-uuid="a35d4bf4-d085-42af-8f67-c7624bd52521"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the redefining category, </span>redefine <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">the inherited attributes that you want to modify with the needed values.</span></li><li data-uuid="995149e4-dd84-457b-9141-b4282c9d5753"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="5d85b0fb-cb16-4ef0-8d6a-b5ead1b9832f"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customOutgoing</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">label</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;Source&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying the outgoing relation creation command category name</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isCollapsed</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">false</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying relationship creation command category default collapse state</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customIncoming</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customOutgoing</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isIncoming</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">true</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying the category's commands to be for incoming relations</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">label</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;Target&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying the incoming relation creation command category name</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">]; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Modifying the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu commands</h3><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="9665627e-61c0-4fdd-a2a7-843e70ab87b0"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Commands in menus</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p>You can see all the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu commands predefined for the <em>sysMLRelationshipMenu</em> in <em>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog::sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu </em>and <em>sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu.</em></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Removing relationship creation commands from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories</h4><p>To remove relationship creation commands from the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories</p><hr /><ol style="text-align: left;"><li data-uuid="141ae8ea-89ec-40fa-b3b8-b3ec7a944c17"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Place the cursor within the body of the part element redefining a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category<em>.</em></span></li><li data-uuid="d46ffe7f-e244-4dd4-a78a-4599f72cb3be"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, then redefine the command you want to remove and set its multiplicity to zero.</span></li><li data-uuid="bdc66ddf-e61c-4cdd-814f-31da166989e4"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><br /></span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="48143ee6-7510-4b2c-acf2-ca062bd903c1"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customOutgoing</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">assertConstraintUsageItem</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>]</u>; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// removing the <em>actionUsageItem </em>element creation command from the <em>sysMLElementsMenu </em>category by setting the multiplicity to zero</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">]; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Renaming relationship creation commands in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category</h4><p>To rename relationship creation commands in the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="3abe89dd-0784-43cb-8836-3a7f2dd867f6"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Place the cursor within the body of the part element redefining a Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command category </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">and declare a part usage, then redefine the command you want to modify.</span></li><li data-uuid="fce583d7-d898-4d79-88bf-b104e2de7e66"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the redefining usage, redefine the inherited <em>label </em>attribute with the needed value.</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><br /></span></li><li data-uuid="b0038114-7305-4a13-a0f7-f1ddea181d07"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="657cc2ff-7dc8-4a04-8146-1f8a6bb0c486"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomRelationshipCreationDialogs</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">CustomizedRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLRelationshipCreationDialog</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">customOutgoing</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLSourceRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">assertConstraintUsageItem</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">label</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;assert constraint usage&quot;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modified command name</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">sysMLTargetRelationshipsMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">]; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Adding relationship creation commands to the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories</h4><p>To add relationship creation commands to the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories</p><hr /><ul><li data-uuid="3135b717-2a47-4975-8ae4-2abbf9b59d5d">See the <ac:link ac:anchor="Adding relationship creation commands to the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories"><ri:page ri:content-title="Creating Relationship Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Adding relationship creation commands to the Relationship Creation dialog/submenu command categories]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> procedure on the <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Creating Relationship Creation dialog" /></ac:link> page.</li></ul>
````

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=304015621 space=SYSML2P version=3 -->
## PAGE 00564: Customizing the suggested column list in the Configure Table Columns dialog

- page_id: `304015621`
- space_key: `SYSML2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/SYSML2P/pages/304015621/Customizing+the+suggested+column+list+in+the+Configure+Table+Columns+dialog
- version_number: 3
- version_date: `2026-05-06T21:20:29.731+02:00`
- ancestors: SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > Model composition > Views > Creating views > Tabular views > Modeling tabular view columns
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

You can customize the suggested column list in the **Configure Table Columns** dialog for a specific table (tabular view usage or definition) by specifying a *featureByCondition*part. It allows you to indicate a specific metaclass or metadata to make it available in the suggested column list, including its meta-features. The meta-features are grouped under the metaclass/metadata and are available for selection.

###### Customizing the suggested column list in the Configure Table Columns dialog

To customize the suggested column list with specific metaclass/metadata and its meta-features in the **Configure Table Columns**dialog

1. Within the body of a tabular view, create a part usage, define it by DS_Styles::CoreStylesComponents::Predicates::ByElementMetaclassCondition , and redefine featureByCondition .
2. Within the body of the part, create a ref item and redefine elementMetaclass , then set the default to the metaclasses and/or metadata you want to include in the suggested column, listing them in parentheses using metadata access expression.

view'DroneStructure':DS_Views::TabularViews::gt{ 
exposeDroneStructure::**; 
filterKerML::Root::Element::isLibraryElement==falseandhastypeSysML::PartUsage;

// redefining the *featureByCondition*: 
part:DS_Styles::CoreStylesComponents::Predicates::ByElementMetaclassCondition:>>featureByCondition{ 
// redefining the *elementMetaclass*and specifying the needed metaclasses: 
refitem:>>elementMetaclassdefault(KerML::Element.metadata,SysML::RequirementUsage.metadata); 
}

renderrendering:>>asTable{ 
view:>>'Declared Name'; 
view:>>Owner; 
view:>>'Owned Element'[0]; 
view:>>'Declared Short Name'[0]; 
view:>>'Documentation Body'[0]; 
view:>>'Qualified Name'[0]; 
} 
}

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=249577900 space=SYSML2P version=21 -->
## PAGE 00565: Customizing View Creation dialog

- page_id: `249577900`
- space_key: `SYSML2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/SYSML2P/pages/249577900/Customizing+View+Creation+dialog
- version_number: 21
- version_date: `2026-02-09T12:40:11.644+01:00`
- ancestors: SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > Model customization > Custom creation dialogs > Custom View Creation dialog
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

See the following procedures for customizing the predefined *SysMLViewCreationDialog* configuration for the View Creation dialog and submenu.

#### NOTE: Updating the View Creation dialog/submenu

Updating the View Creation dialog/submenu

Once you have created the new View Creation dialog/submenu, activate it via the[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Activating View Creation dialog' space=''].

The procedures on this page use the example of customizing the*SysMLViewCreationDialog***part definition. However, you can similarly customize any other custom view creation dialog customization part definition you may have.

##### Reusing a View Creation dialog/submenu

To reuse a View Creation dialog/submenu

1. In the Containment tree, [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Managing elements' space=''] .
2. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Managing Textual Editor' space=''] for the new namespace.
3. In the Textual Editor, [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Package' space=''] and name it.
4. Within the body of the package, declare a part definition, specify the name for the dialog instance, subclassify the SysMLViewCreationDialog definition from the DS_UIComponents::UIComponents package, then, within the body of the definition:
  1. 
  2. 
  3. 
5. Click the Synchronize button.

package CustomViewCreationDialogs { 
 part def CustomizedViewCreationDialog :>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog{ // redefining and renaming the *SysMLViewCreationDialog*} 
}

##### Renaming the Create View command

The default name for the View Creation dialog's invocation command is **Create View**.

To rename the Create View command

1. Within the body of the part definition element of the new View Creation dialog instance, redefine the actionName attribute with the new view creation command name.
2. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomViewCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedViewCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog{ 
attribute:>>actionNamedefault"Create Diagram";// renaming the view creation command to "Create Diagram" 
} 
}

##### Modifying the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories

#### INFO: Command categories

Command categories

View Creation dialog/submenu command categories predefined in the *3DS SysML Customization* library's *DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog*are:

- sysMLViewsMenu - for the symbolic views command category in the View Creation dialog/submenu.
- sysMLTableMenu - for the tabular views command category in the View Creation dialog/submenu.

###### Creating view creation command categories for the View Creation dialog/submenu

To create view creation command categories for the View Creation dialog/submenu

- See the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating View Creation dialog' space=''] procedure on the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating View Creation dialog' space=''] page.

###### Removing view creation command categories from the View Creation dialog/submenu

To remove view creation command categories from the View Creation dialog/submenu

1. Within the body of the part definition element of the new View Creation dialog instance, redefine the command category you want to customize, inherited from the SysMLViewCreationDialog definition and set the multiplicity to zero.
2. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomViewCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedViewCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog{ 
part:>>sysMLTableMenu[0];// removing the sysMLTableMenu command category by setting the multiplicity to zero 
} 
}

###### Modifying the view creation command category attributes of the View Creation dialog/submenu

#### INFO: Command category attributes

Command category attributes

View Creation dialog/submenu command category attributes predefined for *sysMLViewsMenu*and *sysMLTableMenu*in *DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog*are:

- attribute :>> label default "Symbolic Views" ; // attribute specifies the Symbolic Views category name (via *sysMLViewsMenu*)
- attribute :>> label default "Tabular Views" ; // attribute specifies the Tabular Views category name (via *sysMLTableMenu*)
- attribute:>> isCollapseddefaulttrue;// attribute specifies whether the category is collapsed or expanded by default

If the dialog/submenu contains fewer than ten view commands, then the category cannot be collapsed. In this case, the *isCollapsed* attribute is ignored.

To modify the view creation command category attributes of the View Creation dialog/submenu

1. Within the body of the part definition element of the new View Creation dialog instance, redefine the command category you want to customize, inherited from the SysMLViewCreationDialog definition.
2. Within the body of the redefining category, redefine the inherited attributes that you want to modify with the needed values.
3. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomViewCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedViewCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog{ 
part:>>sysMLViewsMenu{ 
attribute:>>isCollapseddefaulttrue;// modified category's default collapse state 
attribute:>>labeldefault"SysML v2 Symbolic Views";// naming the symbolic views' creation command category 
} 
part:>>sysMLTableMenu{ 
attribute:>>isCollapseddefaulttrue;// modified category's default collapse state 
attribute:>>labeldefault"SysML v2 Tabular Views";// naming the tabular views' creation command category 
} 
} 
}

##### Modifying the View Creation dialog/submenu commands

#### INFO: Commands in categories

Commands in categories

View Creation dialog/submenu commands predefined for *sysMLViewsMenu*and *sysMLTableMenu*in *DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog*are:

- sysMLViewsMenu:
  - gvItem - command for General View
  - ivItem - command for Interconnection View
  - afvItem - command for Action Flow View
  - stvItem - command for State Transition View
- sysMLTableMenu:
  - gtItem - command for General Table
  - rtItem - command for Requirements Table

###### Removing view creation commands from the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories

To remove view creation commands from the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories

1. Place the cursor within the body of the part element redefining a View Creation dialog/submenu command category*.*
2. Declare a part usage, then redefine the command you want to remove and set its multiplicity to zero.
3. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomViewCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedViewCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog{ 
part:>>sysMLViewsMenu{ 
part:>>afvItem[0];// removing the afvItem command from the sysMLViewsMenu category by setting the multiplicity to zero 
} 
} 
}

###### Renaming view creation commands in the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories

To rename view creation commands in the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories

1. Place the cursor within the body of the part element redefining a View Creation dialog/submenu command category and declare a part usage, then redefine the command you want to modify.
2. Within the body of the redefining usage, redefine the inherited *label*attribute with the needed value.
3. Click the Synchronize button.

packageCustomViewCreationDialogs{ 
partdefCustomizedViewCreationDialog:>DS_UIComponents::UIComponents::SysMLViewCreationDialog{ 
part:>>sysMLViewsMenu{ 
part:>>afvItem{ 
attribute:>>labeldefault"Action Flow Diagram";// modified command name 
} 
} 
} 
}

###### Adding view creation commands to the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories

To add view creation commands to the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories

- See the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating View Creation dialog' space=''] procedure on the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Creating View Creation dialog' space=''] page.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE
